title: never coming down
lyrics: You should be happy sitting here in your own mind You should be happy anywhere you are, any place, anything When you're further from your own bright star Your own bright star I can't describe what you're looking at down here Looking underneath your feet Wondering if you've lost everything around you Oh, I know that I'm never coming down as long as you're around Now I know I'm never gonna come down as long as you're around From the seas up to the valley To the windows of the clouds To the peaks of the mountain and the mountain and the soldiers No, I'm never coming down Yo, I'm never coming down I'm never coming down No, no, no, I'm never coming down When everything's gone lost inside And you know that tonight you're rocking too high Just bag it right, rock it right, take a night Take a little stroll inside your mind tonight When it gets dark, you know it gets brighter Unless you want to expire Don't put it out, cause I won't put it out As long as we keep climbing higher I'm never coming down Ooh, yeah I'm never coming down You're never coming down As long as you come around with me Around again, around the bend and not touch the end Don't put a false start on a false bravado Don't make it the end of the scenery Just dream with me and never come down Oh, yeah I'm never coming down Just dream, just be with me And never, never, never come around As long as you're around, I'm never coming down I swear I've been found I believe in me, believe in scenery Believe in ecstasy, believe in all inside me I'm never coming down with you again So if you wanna fly around then jump down Jump off here, jump off the ledge I'll watch as you fly away Cause you're taking advice and you're taking them The better way for you, you can only know You can only know which way is better for The lights above me I'm never coming down from the lights above me I see that star, I see that moment Repeating a spark in history Don't you know I own that shit Thanks for watching!

lyricsSegments.text: You should be happy sitting here in your own mind
You should be happy anywhere you are, any place, anything
When you're further from your own bright star
Your own bright star
I can't describe what you're looking at down here
Looking underneath your feet
Wondering if you've lost everything around you
Oh, I know that I'm never coming down as long as you're around
Now I know I'm never gonna come down as long as you're around
From the seas up to the valley
To the windows of the clouds
To the peaks of the mountain and the mountain and the soldiers
No, I'm never coming down
Yo, I'm never coming down
I'm never coming down
No, no, no, I'm never coming down
When everything's gone lost inside
And you know that tonight you're rocking too high
Just bag it right, rock it right, take a night
Take a little stroll inside your mind tonight
When it gets dark, you know it gets brighter
Unless you want to expire
Don't put it out, cause I won't put it out
As long as we keep climbing higher
I'm never coming down
Ooh, yeah
I'm never coming down
You're never coming down
As long as you come around with me
Around again, around the bend and not touch the end
Don't put a false start on a false bravado
Don't make it the end of the scenery
Just dream with me and never come down
Oh, yeah
I'm never coming down
Just dream, just be with me
And never, never, never come around
As long as you're around, I'm never coming down
I swear I've been found
I believe in me, believe in scenery
Believe in ecstasy, believe in all inside me
I'm never coming down with you again
So if you wanna fly around then jump down
Jump off here, jump off the ledge
I'll watch as you fly away
Cause you're taking advice and you're taking them
The better way for you, you can only know
You can only know which way is better for
The lights above me
I'm never coming down from the lights above me
I see that star, I see that moment
Repeating a spark in history
Don't you know I own that shit
Thanks for watching!
